acceptance_criteria: The recursive method is documented and committed in repo artifacts.
The process validator enforces stage order, handoffs, module profile evidence, and changed-path coverage.

open_questions.question: Parent work item closes through child slices rather than direct code generation.

objective: Define the required artifact flow and enforcement model.
functional_requirements: Every material change must emit committed work item artifacts.
Every iteration must preserve explicit stage inputs and outputs.
non_functional_requirements: The process must scale across the full workspace without bypassing existing ownership boundaries.
CI must fail when stage artifacts or coverage evidence are incomplete.
out_of_scope: Creating new runtime-governed agent manifests for implementation and validation roles in this first pass.
success_metrics: A Rust validator can detect incomplete work items.
Prompt procedures match the machine-readable stage model.
assumptions: Committed work items are acceptable repository state for engineering changes.
